defaultTitle.description: Default heading of the newsletter sign-up card when no custom title is provided.

defaultDescription.description: Default subheading of the newsletter sign-up card when no custom description is provided.

closeAriaLabel.description: Accessible label for the button that closes the newsletter sign-up card.

invalidEmail.description: Validation message shown when the entered email address is not valid.

successTitle.description: Heading shown after a successful newsletter subscription.

successDescription.description: Body shown after subscribing, asking the user to confirm via the email they received.

subscribeAnother.description: Button on the success screen to subscribe a different email address.

emailPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the email input in the minimal newsletter form variant.

subscribing.description: Button label shown while the subscription request is in progress.

subscribe.description: Submit button label for the minimal newsletter form variant.

subscribeToNewsletter.description: Submit button label for the full newsletter form variant.

nameLabel.description: Label for the optional name field in the newsletter form.

namePlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the optional name input in the newsletter form.

emailLabel.description: Label for the email field in the newsletter form.

emailExamplePlaceholder.description: Example-email placeholder for the email input. Keep as an email-like example.

subscribedTitle.description: Success toast title shown when the user subscribes.

alreadySubscribedTitle.description: Info toast title shown when the email is already subscribed.

alreadySubscribedDescription.description: Info toast body shown when the email is already on the mailing list.

failedTitle.description: Error toast title shown when the subscription fails.

failedFallback.description: Generic fallback error toast body when no specific subscription error is available.
